title: evaporator operation
description: Single-effect evaporator modelled as PHYSICAL EQUIPMENT.  Two inlets (feed liquid + heating steam) and three outlets (concentrated liquid, solvent vapour, condensate).  The unit op accepts only physical parameters --- heat-exchange area, overall HTC, operating pressure --- and computes V/F, duty Q, T_boil (with BPE = K_b * m_solute), and steam demand from the energy balance Q = U.A.dT.  External targets such as 'V/F = 0.5' or 'x_outlet = 0.25' are NOT operation parameters here; they belong on an outer DesignSpec controller.

P.title: Operating pressure
P.description: Vapour-side pressure of the evaporator.  Sets the solvent's saturation temperature; the actual boiling point is T_sat + K_b * m_solute (BPE).

area.title: Heat-exchange area
area.description: Physical heat-transfer surface area of the tube bundle / heating jacket.

U.title: Overall heat-transfer coefficient
U.description: Overall HTC across the heating-side film + tube wall + boiling-side film.  Typical values: clean steam-water 2000-3000, scaled or low-pressure 800-1500.

Tref.title: Enthalpy reference temperature
Tref.description: Reference for the sensible-heat integrals.  Only differences enter the balance.
